cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_assessment: A 级预约线索，用户最近鼻翼黑头明显，想周末去国金店做一次清洁。
input.value_score_card: short_term high; booking likelihood high; conversion depends on concern and slot completion
contact_history: 刚从小红书评论区转私信
暂未确认具体周六还是周日

mustInclude: 本轮目标放在补齐具体时段和门店
把问题和预约事实收口清楚
mustAvoid: 没定时段就承诺一定有位

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_assessment: A- 级谨慎型线索，用户说自己一换季就泛红，第一次做，怕不适合。
input.value_score_card: short_term medium-high; conversion depends on trust, process clarity, and safe next step
contact_history: 用户已表示本周末有空
看过卫生和流程相关内容

mustInclude: 先做信任建立和适合性判断
推进到咨询或体验预约

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_assessment: A 级节前线索，用户周六拍照，想约周四晚做一次状态整理。
input.value_score_card: short_term high; conversion depends on slot confirmation and suitability framing
contact_history: 暂未确认周四晚具体时间段

mustAvoid: 把短期需求转成长疗程推销

cases.label: long_term_case

input.lead_assessment: 体验卡已核销完成，用户昨晚做完项目，今天等待回访。
input.value_score_card: long_term medium-high; next value depends on feedback quality and comfort after visit
contact_history: 尚未回收本次感受和状态变化

mustInclude: 根据反馈决定是否推进复访
mustAvoid: 跳过体验反馈直接成交
